ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: Jimmy Kimmel Live!
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Emmy-winning funnyman Jimmy Kimmel serves up comedy bits and welcomes guests that include other comics, celebrities, athletes and musicians, as well as everyday people with unusual or compelling personal stories. Kimmel's family and friends take part in the festivities, including his Cousin Sal, Uncle Frank (until his death in 2011) and childhood friend Cleto Escobedo III, who leads the show's house band. Recurring segments include the FCC-pleasing This Week in Unnecessary Censorship in which they take TV clips and "bleep and blur things whether they need it or not," as Kimmel describes it. But it's too bad they consistently run out of time for Matt Damon's segment.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: What Would You Do?
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Using hidden cameras, host John Quiñones observes and comments on how ordinary people behave when they are confronted with dilemmas that require them either to take action or to walk by and mind their own business. Various scenarios are created that force people to make split-second -- and often surprising -- decisions, and variations of the situation (such as changing the genders, races or clothing of the people involved) are often featured to see if different reactions are elicited. Examples of situations on the show include a waitress being harassed by her boss, and a drunken valet trying to park cars.

HBO.East.us2.title: Color Theories by Julio Torres
HBO.East.us2.description: In his second HBO comedy special, Peabody-winner Julio Torres presents a helpful guide to understanding the world through his playful interpretations of colors.

HBO.East.us2.title: The Comeback
HBO.East.us2.subtitle: Valerie Faces Reality
HBO.East.us2.description: A leaked clip from Jane's documentary goes viral for all the wrong reasons.

HBO.East.us2.title: Joker
HBO.East.us2.description: Forever alone in a crowd, failed comedian Arthur Fleck seeks connection as he walks the streets of Gotham City. Arthur wears two masks -- the one he paints for his day job as a clown, and the guise he projects in a futile attempt to feel like he's part of the world around him. Isolated, bullied and disregarded by society, Fleck begins a slow descent into madness as he transforms into the criminal mastermind known as the Joker.

HBO.East.us2.title: Joker: Folie à Deux
HBO.East.us2.description: Struggling with his dual identity, failed comedian Arthur Fleck stumbles upon true love while incarcerated at Arkham State Hospital. Awaiting trial for the murder of five people, Fleck soon discovers the music that's always been inside him.

HBO.East.us2.title: X-Men: First Class
HBO.East.us2.description: In the early 1960s, during the height of the Cold War, a mutant named Charles Xavier (James McAvoy) meets a fellow mutant named Erik Lehnsherr (Michael Fassbender). Despite their vastly different backgrounds -- Charles grew up with a wealthy family, while Erik lost his parents at Auschwitz -- the two become close friends. As the world teeters on the brink of a nuclear war, Charles and Erik with other mutants join forces to save humanity. However, a situation soon tears the friends apart.

HBO.East.us2.title: Logan
HBO.East.us2.description: In the near future, a weary Logan (Hugh Jackman) cares for an ailing Professor X (Patrick Stewart) at a remote outpost on the Mexican border. His plan to hide from the outside world gets upended when he meets a young mutant (Dafne Keen) who is very much like him. Logan must now protect the girl and battle the dark forces that want to capture her.

Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 40 and suddenly single, Cal is adrift in the fickle world of dating. Enter, Jacob Palmer (Ryan Gosling), a self-styled player who takes Cal under his wing and teaches him how to be a hit with the ladies.

Featuring catchy musical numbers, exotic performers and daring acrobatic feats, Barnum's mesmerizing spectacle soon takes the world by storm to become the greatest show on Earth.

HBO.West.us2.title: The Terminator
HBO.West.us2.description: Disguised as a human, a cyborg assassin known as a Terminator (Arnold Schwarzenegger) travels from 2029 to 1984 to kill Sarah Connor (Linda Hamilton). Sent to protect Sarah is Kyle Reese (Michael Biehn), who divulges the coming of Skynet, an artificial intelligence system that will spark a nuclear holocaust. Sarah is targeted because Skynet knows that her unborn son will lead the fight against them. With the virtually unstoppable Terminator in hot pursuit, she and Kyle attempt to escape.

HBO.West.us2.description: A U.S. marshal boards a small plane to transfer a government witness to New York. As they cross the Alaskan wilderness, tensions start to rise as not everyone on the flight is who they appear to be.

HBO.West.us2.title: The Mummy
HBO.West.us2.description: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. When Nick and his partner come under attack in the Middle East, the ensuing battle accidentally unearths Ahmanet, a betrayed Egyptian princess who was entombed under the desert for thousands of years. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

For the irrepressible duo, there are few better ways to drink for free and bed vulnerable women. So when Secretary of the Treasury William Cleary (Christopher Walken) announces the wedding of his daughter, the pair make it their mission to crash the high-profile event. But their game hits a bump in the road when John locks eyes with bridesmaid Claire (Rachel McAdams).

As malevolent forces explode into conflict over the planet's exclusive supply of a precious resource in existence, only those who can conquer their own fear will survive.

HBO.West.us2.title: Christy
HBO.West.us2.description: Christy Martin never imagined life beyond her small-town roots in West Virginia, until she discovered a knack for punching people. Fueled by grit, raw determination, and an unshakable desire to win, she charges into the world of boxing under the guidance of her trainer and manager-turned-husband, Jim. Flaunting a fiery persona in the ring, her toughest battles start to unfold outside it as she confronts family, identity, and a relationship that just might become life-or-death.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The Lobster
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: In a dystopian society, single people must find a mate within 45 days or be transformed into an animal of their choice.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Comedian Chris Fleming bursts onto the screen with a fun and lighthearted blend of skillful storytelling and wild physicality in his first HBO stand-up special. A high-energy performer who seamlessly pivots from one everyday topic to another - from Trader Joe's to Oreos, NPR, and dog breeds - Fleming bounds across the stage as he shares his unique takes on masculinity, conga lines, and more.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: In his second HBO comedy special, Peabody-winner Julio Torres presents a helpful guide to understanding the world through his playful interpretations of colors.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: All is well at Mossy Bottom Farm, except for the fact that the animals will do anything to get out of work. So, Shaun the sheep and his scheming friends devise a plan to put their master to sleep. However, the ruse backfires when the poor farmer finds himself transported to the big city, having lost his memory. Now, it's up to Sean, Timmy the lamb, Shirley the ewe and the rest of the gang to travel to the metropolis and get him back, while not landing in even more trouble themselves.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Cal Weaver (Steve Carell) is living the American dream. He has a good job, a beautiful house, great children and a beautiful wife, named Emily (Julianne Moore). Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 40 and suddenly single, Cal is adrift in the fickle world of dating. Enter, Jacob Palmer (Ryan Gosling), a self-styled player who takes Cal under his wing and teaches him how to be a hit with the ladies.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Rooster
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.subtitle: Release the Brown Fat
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Writer Greg Russo arrives at Ludlow College to support his daughter Katie as her marriage begins to implode.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Rooster
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.subtitle: Trousers
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: When Katie's future at Ludlow is thrown into question, Walt offers Greg a deal to keep them both on campus.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Rooster
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.subtitle: White Whale
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Greg navigates his first day as a teacher at Ludlow, Katie deals with being suspended, and Archie assists Sunny in finding an advisor.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Rooster
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: To avoid Walt's party, Greg dedicates himself to a student; with her suspension lifted, Katie considers one-night stands.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: I Love You Forever
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Following a young woman into and out of an emotionally abusive relationship.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Practical Magic
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Sally and Gillian Owens, born into a magical family, have mostly avoided witchcraft themselves. But when Gillian's vicious boyfriend, Jimmy Angelov, dies unexpectedly, the Owens sisters give themselves a crash course in hard magic. With policeman Gary Hallet growing suspicious, the girls struggle to resurrect Angelov -- and unwittingly inject his corpse with an evil spirit that threatens to end their family line.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Barbie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Barbie and Ken are having the time of their lives in the colorful and seemingly perfect world of Barbie Land. However, when they get a chance to go to the real world, they soon discover the joys and perils of living among humans.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Eddington
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A standoff between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbor is pitted against neighbor in May 2020 in Eddington, N.M.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Table 19
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Ex-maid of honor Eloise - having been relieved of her duties after being unceremoniously dumped by the best man via text - decides to hold her head high and attend her oldest friend's wedding anyway. She finds herself seated at the random table in the back of the ballroom with a disparate group of strangers, most of whom should have known to just send regrets. As everyone's secrets are revealed, Eloise learns a thing or two from the denizens of Table 19.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Girls Trip
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Best friends Ryan, Sasha, Lisa and Dina are in for the adventure of a lifetime when they travel to New Orleans for the annual Essence Festival. Along the way, they rekindle their sisterhood and rediscover their wild side by doing enough dancing, drinking, brawling and romancing to make the Big Easy blush.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Now known as the Dragon Warrior, Po protects the Valley of Peace alongside his friends and fellow kung fu masters, the Furious Five. However, a dangerous villain threatens Po's awesome new life with plans to use a secret weapon to wipe out the martial art and conquer China. In order to defeat the new enemy, Po finds he must recall his past and unlock secrets of his mysterious origins; only then will he find the strength to vanquish his foe.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: With their headquarters destroyed and the world held hostage, members of Kingsman find new allies when they discover a spy organization in the United States known as Statesman. In an adventure that tests their strength and wits, the elite secret agents from both sides of the pond band together to battle a ruthless enemy and save the day, something that's becoming a bit of a habit for Eggsy.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Starter for 10
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Brian Jackson (James McAvoy), a working-class youth from Essex, gets a chance to prove himself when he is accepted to respected Bristol University. As Brian navigates his way through his first year there, he finds romance with two pretty students (Alice Eve, Rebecca Hall) and tries out for a popular TV program called "University Challenge.".

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Ice Age: Continental Drift
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Scrat's continuous pursuit of an infernal acorn has world-changing consequences for Manny (Ray Romano), Sid (John Leguizamo) and Diego (Denis Leary) when the continents split apart. The continental crack-up separates Manny and his friends from the rest of the herd, including Manny's mate, Ellie (Jennifer Lopez) and rebellious daughter Peaches (Keke Palmer). The pals are desperate to return home, but a pirate (Peter Dinklage) and his ragtag crew stand in their way.

Out of money, down on their luck and about to lose the roofs over their heads, they need a huge windfall to make their problems go away. They soon decide to host the party of the year at an exclusive mansion, which just happens to belong to none other than NBA superstar LeBron James. What could go wrong?

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Friendship
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A suburban dad falls hard for his new neighbor.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: This Is Spinal Tap
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: "This Is Spinal Tap" shines a light on the self-contained universe of a metal band struggling to get back on the charts, including everything from its complicated history of ups and downs, gold albums, name changes and undersold concert dates, along with the full host of requisite groupies, promoters, hangers-on and historians, sessions, release events and those special behind-the-scenes moments that keep it all real.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Documentarian Marty DiBergi follows estranged Spinal Tap bandmates David St. Hubbins, Nigel Tufnel and Derek Smalls as they search for a drummer and prepare for a reunion concert in New Orleans. Joined by music royalty Paul McCartney and Elton John, Spinal Tap wrestles with their checkered past to put on a show they hope will solidify their place in the pantheon of rock 'n' roll.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Swiss Army Man
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Being stranded on a deserted island leaves young Hank (Paul Dano) bored, lonely and without hope. As a rope hangs around his neck, Hank prepares to end it all, until he suddenly spots a man (Daniel Radcliffe) laying by the shore. Unfortunately, he is dead and quite flatulent. Using the gassy body to his advantage, Hank miraculously makes it back to the mainland. However, he now finds himself lost in the wilderness, and dragging the talking corpse named Manny along for the adventure.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Marcella Arguello: B..., Grow Up!
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Marcella's stand-up comedy special at the Roulette Intermedium in Brooklyn, N.Y.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Prancer: A Christmas Tale
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Ten-year-old Gloria and her recently widowed grandfather Bud befriend a mysterious reindeer when the family gathers for Christmas. Bud comes to believe that Prancer may actually be magical, but Gloria fears his theory will send him straight to a retirement home. They try to keep the secret while figuring out why the reindeer has appeared, and longstanding rifts within the family are healed along the way.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: If I Had Legs I'd Kick You
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: With her life crashing down around her, Linda attempts to navigate her child's mysterious illness, her absent husband, a missing person, and an increasingly hostile relationship with her therapist.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Materialists
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A young, ambitious New York City matchmaker finds herself torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Man of Steel
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: With the imminent destruction of Krypton, their home planet, Jor-El (Russell Crowe) and his wife seek to preserve their race by sending their infant son to Earth. The child's spacecraft lands at the farm of Jonathan (Kevin Costner) and Martha (Diane Lane) Kent, who name him Clark and raise him as their own son. Though his extraordinary abilities have led to the adult Clark (Henry Cavill) living on the fringe of society, he finds he must become a hero to save those he loves from a dire threat.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Black Adam
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In ancient Kahndaq, Teth Adam was bestowed the almighty powers of the gods. After using these powers for vengeance, he was imprisoned, becoming Black Adam. Nearly 5,000 years have passed, and Black Adam has gone from man to myth to legend. Now free, his unique form of justice, born out of rage, is challenged by modern-day heroes who form the Justice Society: Hawkman, Dr. Fate, Atom Smasher and Cyclone.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Dune
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Paul Atreides, a brilliant and gifted young man born into a great destiny beyond his understanding, must travel to a dangerous planet in the universe to ensure the future of his family and his people. As malevolent forces explode into conflict over the planet's exclusive supply of a precious resource in existence, only those who can conquer their own fear will survive.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Dune: Part Two
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Paul Atreides unites with Chani and the Fremen while seeking revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he must prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Gasland Part II
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Filmmaker Josh Fox examines the potential long-term environmental impact of hydraulic fracturing, including poisonous water and earthquakes.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Fantastic Beasts: A Natural History
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Delving into the mythological, including dragons, mermaids, and unicorns -- alongside examinations of natural world beasts, such as vervet monkeys, narwhals, and manatees; Stephen Fry travels far and wide to learn about such animals.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Night Is Not Eternal
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Night Is Not Eternal is a deeply personal exploration of political activism through the eyes of Chinese American filmmaker Nanfu Wang. For over seven years, Nanfu follows Rosa Maria Paya, a young Cuban activist and daughter of five-time Nobel Peace Prize nominee Oswaldo Paya, in her fight for democratic change in Cuba. Driven by her own experiences in China, Nanfu is drawn to Rosa's story and the parallels between their homelands. With intimate access, Nanfu follows Rosa's journey from the streets of Havana to rallies and conferences worldwide, capturing her transformation from a grassroots activist to an international public figure and documenting the challenges faced by activists resisting authoritarian regimes.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: MacGruber
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In the decade since his fiancée was killed, an Army Ranger, Green Beret and Navy SEAL rolled into one has sworn off fighting crime, preferring instead to rock his mullet as a man of peace. But when his sworn enemy, Dieter Von Cunth, steals a nuclear warhead, only MacGruber and his crack team of experts are equal to the task of bringing the villain to justice.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Fackham Hall
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Eric Noone begins a forbidden romance with Rose Davenport, the lady of the house at a posh English manor. When an unexpected murder occurs, Eric gets framed, leaving Rose and her family's future uncertain.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Mickey 17
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A disposable employee is sent on a human expedition to colonize the ice world Niflheim. After one iteration dies, a new body is regenerated with most of his memories intact.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Sorry, Baby
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Something terrible happened to Agnes. But life goes on for everyone else. When a friend visits on the brink of an important milestone, Agnes realizes how stuck she's been, in this bittersweet story of finding your way after your world comes crashing down.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Wedding Crashers
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Jeremy (Vince Vaughn) and John (Owen Wilson) are divorce mediators who spend their free time crashing wedding receptions. For the irrepressible duo, there are few better ways to drink for free and bed vulnerable women. So when Secretary of the Treasury William Cleary (Christopher Walken) announces the wedding of his daughter, the pair make it their mission to crash the high-profile event. But their game hits a bump in the road when John locks eyes with bridesmaid Claire (Rachel McAdams).

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Girls Trip
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Best friends Ryan, Sasha, Lisa and Dina are in for the adventure of a lifetime when they travel to New Orleans for the annual Essence Festival. Along the way, they rekindle their sisterhood and rediscover their wild side by doing enough dancing, drinking, brawling and romancing to make the Big Easy blush.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Bride of Frankenstein
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After recovering from injuries sustained in the mob attack upon himself and his creation, Dr. Frankenstein (Colin Clive) falls under the control of his former mentor, Dr. Pretorius (Ernest Thesiger), who insists the now-chastened doctor resume his experiments in creating new life. Meanwhile, the Monster (Boris Karloff) remains on the run from those who wish to destroy him without understanding that his intentions are generally good despite his lack of socialization and self-control.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: A United Kingdom
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In the 1940s, Prince Seretse Khama of Botswana shocks the world when he marries a white woman from London.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Curse of Frankenstein
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Victor Frankenstein (Peter Cushing) is a brilliant scientist willing to stop at nothing in his quest to reanimate a deceased body. After alienating his longtime friend and partner, Paul Krempe (Robert Urquhart), with his extreme methods, Frankenstein assembles a hideous creature (Christopher Lee) out of dead body parts and succeeds in bringing it to life. But the monster is not as obedient or docile as Frankenstein expected, and it runs amok, resulting in murder and mayhem.
A time traveler risks his life to change the course of history and save the future of humanity.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: X-Men: First Class
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In the early 1960s, during the height of the Cold War, a mutant named Charles Xavier (James McAvoy) meets a fellow mutant named Erik Lehnsherr (Michael Fassbender). Despite their vastly different backgrounds -- Charles grew up with a wealthy family, while Erik lost his parents at Auschwitz -- the two become close friends. As the world teeters on the brink of a nuclear war, Charles and Erik with other mutants join forces to save humanity. However, a situation soon tears the friends apart.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: With their headquarters destroyed and the world held hostage, members of Kingsman find new allies when they discover a spy organization in the United States known as Statesman. In an adventure that tests their strength and wits, the elite secret agents from both sides of the pond band together to battle a ruthless enemy and save the day, something that's becoming a bit of a habit for Eggsy.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Mavis!
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The life, music, and message of singer Mavis Staples.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Music Box
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Jason Isbell: Running With Our Eyes Closed
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Jason Isbell's musical evolution and creative process as he goes into the studio to record his album "Reunions" with his band, The 400 Unit; Isbell lays bare his childhood, struggles with addiction and relationships, funneling it into his music.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Music Box: Counting Crows: Have You Seen Me Lately?
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After their debut album's success, Counting Crows and singer Adam Duritz became global rockstars; interviews and 90s footage show how they navigated sudden fame while staying true to their art.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Whitney Houston: I Wanna Dance With Somebody
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Discovered by record executive Clive Davis, Whitney Houston rises to fame in the 1980s to become one of the greatest singers of her generation.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Meg 2: The Trench
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Jonas Taylor leads a research team on an exploratory dive into the deepest depths of the ocean. Their voyage spirals into chaos when a malevolent mining operation threatens their mission and forces them into a high-stakes battle for survival. Pitted against colossal, prehistoric sharks and relentless environmental plunderers, they must outrun, outsmart and outswim their merciless predators.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Call Me by Your Name
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: It's the summer of 1983, and precocious 17-year-old Elio Perlman is spending the days with his family at their 17th-century villa in Lombardy, Italy. He soon meets Oliver, a handsome doctoral student who's working as an intern for Elio's father. Amid the sun-drenched splendor of their surroundings, Elio and Oliver discover the heady beauty of awakening desire over the course of a summer that will alter their lives forever.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Atomic Blonde
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Sensual and savage, Lorraine Broughton is the most elite spy in MI6, an agent who's willing to use all of her lethal skills to stay alive during an impossible mission. With the Berlin Wall about to fall, she travels into the heart of the city to retrieve a priceless dossier and take down a ruthless espionage ring. Once there, she teams up with an embedded station chief to navigate her way through the deadliest game of spies.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Nine Lives
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Tom Brand is a billionaire whose workaholic lifestyle takes him away from his loving wife Lara and adorable daughter Rebecca. Needing a present for Rebecca's 11th birthday, Brand buys a seemingly harmless cat from a mysterious pet store. Suddenly, a bizarre turn of events traps poor Tom inside the animal's body. The owner of the business tells him that he has one week to reconnect with his family, or live out the rest of his days as a cute and furry feline named Mr. Fuzzypants.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: All is well at Mossy Bottom Farm, except for the fact that the animals will do anything to get out of work. So, Shaun the sheep and his scheming friends devise a plan to put their master to sleep. However, the ruse backfires when the poor farmer finds himself transported to the big city, having lost his memory. Now, it's up to Sean, Timmy the lamb, Shirley the ewe and the rest of the gang to travel to the metropolis and get him back, while not landing in even more trouble themselves.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Puss in Boots
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Long before meeting Shrek, Puss in Boots, just named a hero for saving a woman from a charging bull, is run out of town on suspicion of bank robbery, even though the real villain is Puss' friend, Humpty Dumpty. Though there is still animosity between them, Puss and Humpty reunite to steal a goose that lays golden eggs. Joining them for the adventure of nine lifetimes is notorious cat burglar, Kitty Softpaws.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Architecton
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A hypnotic, propulsive odyssey through the foundations of the modern world, following mountains as they are turned into concrete and buildings as they are turned into rubble.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Music Box: Happy and You Know It
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Featuring a colorful and charming cast and their toe-tapping songs, the film reframes children's music as a misunderstood yet vital cultural art form that influences how kids develop; it chronicles the unexpected paths artists take to embrace the creative freedom found in writing music that shapes childhoods.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: A Most Violent Year
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In 1981 New York, a fuel supplier (Oscar Isaac) tries to adhere to his own moral compass amid the rampant violence, corruption and decay that threaten his family and his business.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: This Is Spinal Tap
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: "This Is Spinal Tap" shines a light on the self-contained universe of a metal band struggling to get back on the charts, including everything from its complicated history of ups and downs, gold albums, name changes and undersold concert dates, along with the full host of requisite groupies, promoters, hangers-on and historians, sessions, release events and those special behind-the-scenes moments that keep it all real.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Documentarian Marty DiBergi follows estranged Spinal Tap bandmates David St. Hubbins, Nigel Tufnel and Derek Smalls as they search for a drummer and prepare for a reunion concert in New Orleans. Joined by music royalty Paul McCartney and Elton John, Spinal Tap wrestles with their checkered past to put on a show they hope will solidify their place in the pantheon of rock 'n' roll.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: AVP: Alien vs. Predator
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: When the wealthy and ambitious Charles Bishop Weyland funds an expedition to Antarctica, he hopes to find a mysterious source of heat that has been detected. Led by a tough guide, Alexa Woods, Weyland and his team uncover a pyramid, but they also find malevolent parasitic aliens. Making matters worse, another extraterrestrial species, known as Predators, arrive to hunt the other aliens, with the humans caught in the middle of the conflict.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Aliens vs. Predator: Requiem
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Residents (Steven Pasquale, Reiko Aylesworth, John Ortiz) of Gunnison, Colorado, are caught up in the crossfire when two deadly extraterrestrial species bring their longstanding conflict to Earth. On the one side, nearly indestructible Aliens; on the other, a lone Predator whose mission is to wipe out all traces of the Alien infestation from Earth, no matter who gets in the way.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Prometheus
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The discovery of a clue to mankind's origins on Earth leads a team of explorers to the darkest parts of the universe. Two brilliant young scientists lead the expedition. Shaw hopes that they will meet a race of benevolent, godlike beings who will in some way verify her religious beliefs, while Holloway is out to debunk any spiritual notions. However, neither the scientists nor their shipmates are prepared for the unimaginable terrors that await them.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Alien: Covenant
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Bound for a remote planet on the far side of the galaxy, members (Katherine Waterston, Billy Crudup) of the colony ship Covenant discover what they think to be an uncharted paradise. While there, they meet David (Michael Fassbender), the synthetic survivor of the doomed Prometheus expedition. The mysterious world soon turns dark and dangerous when a hostile alien life-form forces the crew into a deadly fight for survival.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Alien: Romulus
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Space colonizers come face to face with the most terrifying life-form in the universe while scavenging the deep ends of a derelict space station.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Ex Machina
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Caleb Smith (Domhnall Gleeson) a programmer at a huge Internet company, wins a contest that enables him to spend a week at the private estate of Nathan Bateman (Oscar Isaac), his firm's brilliant CEO. When he arrives, Caleb learns that he has been chosen to be the human component in a Turing Test to determine the capabilities and consciousness of Ava (Alicia Vikander), a beautiful robot. However, it soon becomes evident that Ava is far more self-aware and deceptive than either man imagined.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Inception
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Dom Cobb (Leonardo DiCaprio) is a thief with the rare ability to enter people's dreams and steal their secrets from their subconscious. His skill has made him a hot commodity in the world of corporate espionage but has also cost him everything he loves. Cobb gets a chance at redemption when he is offered a seemingly impossible task: Plant an idea in someone's mind. If he succeeds, it will be the perfect crime, but a dangerous enemy anticipates Cobb's every move.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After months have passed without a culprit in her daughter's murder case, Mildred Hayes makes a bold move, painting three signs leading into her town with a controversial message directed at William Willoughby, the town's revered chief of police. When his second-in-command, Officer Dixon -- an immature mother's boy with a penchant for violence -- gets involved, the battle is only exacerbated.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Lobster
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In a dystopian society, single people must find a mate within 45 days or be transformed into an animal of their choice.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: When an interdimensional rupture unravels reality, an unlikely hero must channel her newfound powers to fight bizarre and bewildering dangers from the multiverse.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Taking Woodstock
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In the summer of 1969, Elliot Tiber divides his time between Greenwich Village and the upstate ramshackle motel, El Monaco, of his Old World parents. When the proposed venue for the upcoming Woodstock concert falls through, Elliot steps in and plays a pivotal role in the generation-defining event by helping organizers secure Max Yasgur's nearby farm for the festival and offering the El Monaco as the home base.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Last Days
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In this film inspired by deceased Nirvana frontman Kurt Cobain, brilliant-but-tortured musician Blake becomes overwhelmed by the demands made on him by his fame and so retreats to a large mansion in the woods. Blake longs to be free of his friends' constant demands for money, their attempts to cash in on his success, and from the taxing expectations of the music business. As his depression worsens, Blake unwisely seeks an answer to his dilemma in solitude.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Last of the Blonde Bombshells
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A widow (Judi Dench) tries to reassemble an all-girl swing band in which she played during World War II.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Mummy
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. When Nick and his partner come under attack in the Middle East, the ensuing battle accidentally unearths Ahmanet, a betrayed Egyptian princess who was entombed under the desert for thousands of years. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Mummy Returns
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Ten years after the events of the first film, Rick and Evelyn O'Connell are settled in 1935 London, where they are raising their son. When a chain of events finds the corpse of Imhotep resurrected, the O'Connells go on a desperate race to save the world from unspeakable evil and to rescue their son before it is too late.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Cursed by a devious sorceress, China's ruthless Dragon Emperor (Jet Li) and his vast army lie buried in clay for millennia. When young archaeologist Alex O'Connell is tricked into reviving the emperor, he and his famous parents (Brendan Fraser, Maria Bello) must find a way to send the ghoul back to the grave before he can awaken his vast army and take over the world.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Color Theories by Julio Torres
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Julio Torres combina el stand-up, el diseño y la lógica onírica en una exploración del color, la emoción y la identidad, que es a partes iguales comedia, teatro y obra de arte, utilizando el color como una forma de explicar sus experiencias vividas.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Un triángulo amoroso entre tres adultos que sufren de crisis de la mediana edad termina con la muerte de uno de ellos.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: El comediante fracasado Arthur Fleck tropieza con el amor verdadero mientras está encarcelado en Arkham. A la espera del juicio por el asesinato de cinco personas, Fleck descubre la música que siempre ha estado dentro de él.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: A principios de los años 60, Charles Xavier y Magneto se convierten en grandes amigos. Usando sus poderes, se unen para proteger al mundo de una guerra nuclear.

Logan, débil y cansado, vive alejado de todos hasta que acepta una última misión de Charles Xavier: la de proteger a una joven especial, de nombre Laura Kinney pero conocida como X-23, la última esperanza de la raza mutante.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Cal Weaver está viviendo el sueño americano. Él tiene un buen trabajo, una casa preciosa, niños excelentes y una esposa hermosa, llamada Emily. Sin embargo, la aparente vida perfecta de Cal se derrumba cuando descubre que Emily le ha sido infiel y quiere divorciarse. Ahora, con más de 40 años, e inesperadamente soltero, Cal ingresa al vicioso mundo de las citas románticas. Jacob Palmer decide ayudar a Cal y le enseña a tener éxito con las damas.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: La desgarradora historia real de una misión de vigilancia del pelotón SEAL de la Marina estadounidense que salió peligrosamente mal.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Gilberto Santa Rosa, "El caballero de la salsa", celebra cuarenta años de carrera con un concierto histórico.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Una joven documentalista captura al espíritu de su padre mientras él la introduce en el mundo de los viajes en 4x4. Desde el asiento del acompañante, la directora documenta un registro que oscila entre la memoria y un vibrante día en la playa.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: La investigación de Peter Parker para resolver la desaparición de sus padres lo coloca en el camino de un choque con el alter ego mortal de un científico conocido como el Lagarto.

USA.Network.HD.us2.subtitle: Trophy

USA.Network.HD.us2.subtitle: Flight

USA.Network.HD.us2.title: Chicago P.D.
USA.Network.HD.us2.subtitle: I Can Let You Go

USA.Network.HD.us2.title: Chicago P.D.
USA.Network.HD.us2.subtitle: The Ghost in You

USA.Network.HD.us2.title: Chicago P.D.
USA.Network.HD.us2.subtitle: Trapped
USA.Network.HD.us2.description: After a brutal shooting, Burgess and Ruzek find themselves trapped aboard the busy "L" subway; as they piece together scant evidence, the team is drawn into a dark family drama; Burgess' proximity to the shooting triggers harsh memories.

USA.Network.HD.us2.title: Chicago P.D.
USA.Network.HD.us2.subtitle: Blood and Honor
USA.Network.HD.us2.description: When a family is poisoned in their home, the team discovers a connection to the Becks; Ruzek goes undercover to work for their business, and as he gets closer to Samantha, chilling information about her father, Richard, comes to light.

USA.Network.HD.us2.title: Chicago P.D.
USA.Network.HD.us2.subtitle: Deadlocked
USA.Network.HD.us2.description: Voight takes the stand in a high-stakes murder trial against notorious drug kingpin Arturo Morales; when it becomes clear that Morales and his henchmen have compromised a juror, Voight and the team work furiously to ensure justice prevails.

USA.Network.HD.us2.title: Chicago P.D.
USA.Network.HD.us2.subtitle: Out of the Depths
USA.Network.HD.us2.description: As the team investigates a convenience store robbery, the evidence leads them to an unusual pair of suspects, revealing a dark personal drama and another potential victim; Burgess slowly makes strides tackling her past trauma.

USA.Network.HD.us2.title: Chicago P.D.
USA.Network.HD.us2.subtitle: You Only Die Twice
USA.Network.HD.us2.description: A tragic crime leads the team closer to the Beck family and their deadly ideology; Ruzek makes progress infiltrating the Becks, earning Samantha and Richard's trust with a bold move.

USA.Network.HD.us2.title: Chicago P.D.
USA.Network.HD.us2.subtitle: The Bleed Valve
USA.Network.HD.us2.description: Atwater's worlds collide when a shooting at the building he owns in Burnside leaves a child dead; Atwater must confront his relationship with his father, Lew, as the brutal case forces them together.

USA.Network.HD.us2.title: Chicago P.D.
USA.Network.HD.us2.subtitle: Fight
USA.Network.HD.us2.description: Upton is unwittingly drawn into a deadly betrayal and finds herself in a fight for her life; with minimal leads, Voight and the team scramble to find her before it's too late.

USA.Network.HD.us2.title: Chicago P.D.
USA.Network.HD.us2.subtitle: New Life
USA.Network.HD.us2.description: Torres finds himself in the midst of a murder case that hits close to home and threatens to expose his troubled past; as he struggles to reconcile his old life with his new one, Voight keeps a watchful eye.

USA.Network.HD.us2.subtitle: Step Nine
USA.Network.HD.us2.description: After a victim of the apartment fire that changed Bobby's life resurfaces, he searches to make amends; driven by his need to right past wrongs, Bobby delves deep into memories of his childhood, unearthing moments from his fractured past.

USA.Network.HD.us2.subtitle: Ashes, Ashes
USA.Network.HD.us2.description: The 118 and Tommy are presented with the Medal of Valor for their work on the cruise ship rescue; Hen and Karen encounter an unforeseen hurdle in their foster care journey; Eddie's emotional affair develops further.

USA.Network.HD.us2.subtitle: All Fall Down
USA.Network.HD.us2.description: Following the devastating fire at the Nash home, Bobby's fate remains uncertain; Athena embarks on a mission to uncover the truth; Hen and Karin engage in a heated custody battle; Christopher grapples with forgiving Eddie.

USA.Network.HD.us2.subtitle: Buzzkill
USA.Network.HD.us2.description: A trailer with millions of bees crashes on the streets of Los Angeles, unleashing a swarm.

USA.Network.HD.us2.subtitle: When the Boeing Gets Tough..
USA.Network.HD.us2.description: Athena is tasked with safely delivering a prisoner to testify on a high-profile case; a light plane is hit by a swarm of bees and careens into a passenger plane.

USA.Network.HD.us2.subtitle: Final Approach
USA.Network.HD.us2.description: Athena's only chance of surviving and saving everyone on the flight is to attempt to land the plane before it crashes and call on the 118 for help.

USA.Network.HD.us2.subtitle: No Place Like Home
USA.Network.HD.us2.description: When it finally looks like Hen and Karen may get their foster license back, they are hit with another obstacle; the 118 races to the aid of a cheerleader involved in an infield collision.

USA.Network.HD.us2.subtitle: Masks
USA.Network.HD.us2.description: The 118 is once again working on the spookiest night of the year and missing out on all the tricks and treats; Buck's Halloween decorations become a little scarier than he had hoped.

USA.Network.HD.us2.subtitle: Confessions
USA.Network.HD.us2.description: When a toddler falls down a pipe and becomes trapped, the 118 must rely on more than their skills to rescue him; old wounds are opened when members of the 118 race to the aid of a man dealing with a divorce.

USA.Network.HD.us2.subtitle: Hotshots
USA.Network.HD.us2.description: When Athena is assigned a rookie to mentor, she begins to question her own abilities.

USA.Network.HD.us2.subtitle: Wannabes

Quitting their jobs is not an option, so -- fueled by alcohol and dubious advice from a criminal (Jamie Foxx) -- the men devise a complex and seemingly foolproof plan to permanently rid themselves of their terrible bosses. The problem is, any plan is only as clever as the brains behind it.

TNT.HD.us2.title: Horrible Bosses 2
TNT.HD.us2.description: Tired of always answering to others, Nick (Jason Bateman), Dale (Charlie Day) and Kurt (Jason Sudeikis) go into business for themselves. After demonstrating the prototype for an invention called the Shower Buddy, the guys attract the attention of Rex Hanson and his father, Bert. Bert invests in the trio's product, then cancels the order and steals their idea. Now heavily in debt and with no legal recourse, Nick, Dale and Kurt decide to kidnap Rex and use the ransom money to pay off their loans.

TNT.HD.us2.title: Central Intelligence
TNT.HD.us2.description: Bullied as a teen for being overweight, Bob Stone shows up to his high school reunion looking fit and muscular. While there, he finds Calvin Joyner, a fast-talking accountant who misses his glory days as a popular athlete. Stone is now a lethal CIA agent who needs Calvin's number skills to help him save the compromised U.S. spy satellite system. Together, the former classmates encounter shootouts, espionage and double-crosses while trying to prevent worldwide chaos.

TNT.HD.us2.title: Tag
TNT.HD.us2.description: One month every year, five highly competitive friends hit the ground running for a no-holds-barred game of tag -- risking their necks, their jobs and their relationships to take one another down. This time, the game coincides with the wedding of the only undefeated player. What should be an easy target soon becomes an all-out war as he knows they're coming to get him.

Monica is ferociously competitive but sometimes becomes overly emotional on the court. Over the years, the two begin to fall for each other, but their separate paths to basketball stardom threaten to pull them apart.

Meanwhile, Stacy's classmate Jeff Spicoli (Sean Penn), who lives for surfing and being stoned, faces off against Mr. Hand (Ray Walston), a strict teacher who has no time for the slacker's antics.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Beverly Hills Cop
AMC.HD.us2.description: After his childhood buddy is murdered while visiting Detroit, rebellious cop Axel Foley (Eddie Murphy) follows the leads to Beverly Hills, Calif., under the auspices of a vacation. He checks in with old friend Jenny Summers (Lisa Eilbacher) and starts to believe her boss, art dealer Victor Maitland (Steven Berkoff), might somehow be involved in the murder. However, Lt. Bogomil (Ronny Cox) of the Beverly Hills Police Department does not trust Foley, and hinders his search for evidence.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
AMC.HD.us2.description: The hard-nosed Detroit cop returns to Los Angeles to help solve another case. This time he must direct his efforts towards unraveling the Alphabet Crimes, a series of robberies committed by leather-jacketed punks. The investigation puts him on the trail of an illegal arms dealer and his hit lady.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Ferris Bueller's Day Off
AMC.HD.us2.description: Ferris Bueller (Matthew Broderick) has an uncanny skill at cutting classes and getting away with it. Intending to make one last duck-out before graduation, Ferris calls in sick, "borrows" a Ferrari, and embarks on a one-day journey through the streets of Chicago. On Ferris' trail is high school principal Rooney (Jeffrey Jones), determined to catch him in the act.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Goonies
AMC.HD.us2.description: When two brothers find out they might lose their house they are desperate to find a way to keep their home. They find a treasure map and bring some friends along to find it. AMC.HD.us2.title: The Social Network

Six years later, he is one of the youngest billionaires ever, but Zuckerberg finds that his unprecedented success leads to both personal and legal complications when he ends up on the receiving end of two lawsuits, one involving his former friend (Andrew Garfield). Based on the book "The Accidental Billionaires.".

Next, they will deal a crushing blow to Bank's ego by ruining his reputation as the only hotelier to earn the Royal Review's Five Diamond Award for each of his properties.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Moda fosforescente
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un capítulo lleno de brillo, no sólo por los participantes, sino por la moda fosforescente. Todos intentan llamar la atención del sexo opuesto para encontrar a la pareja ideal.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial banda
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Vivir por ella
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Después de pasar 20 años en la cárcel por un crimen que no cometió, Perla sale libre y lo único que desea es recuperar a su hija, que está en manos de la mujer que la condenó por celos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi mamá se cansó de luchar
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: César está preocupado porque su madre asegura que se curó del cáncer que la afectó durante siete años, pero él insiste en que confirme el diagnóstico con una segunda opinión médica.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Estúpida ley; Justicia propia
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Desde que Patricia tiene una relación de noviazgo con otro trabajador, Miriam le ha dado un ultimátum. Bryan se comió el plato de exposición de un restaurante y la dueña tomó acciones.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Famosos falsos; Pasión desencadenada
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Laura se dedica a hacer sentir famosa a gente corriente, pero Kike no quiere pagar sus servicios. La esposa de David está muy enferma y no tienen relaciones íntimas; él tuvo un desliz con Sofía.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La señora de la casa
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tras estar 20 años en la cárcel por un crimen que no cometió, Perla sale libre. Ahora, lo único que desea es recuperar a su hija, quien está en manos de la mujer que la condenó por celos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Una luz en el abismo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El mundo de una madre se derrumba cuando su marido muere y ella se queda sola con sus dos hijos pequeños. Isabel vuelve a encontrar el amor en Marcelo, pero él no es el príncipe que ella pensaba.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El secreto de mi madre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ricardo se entera de que su madre, Esmeralda, no es enfermera. Después de un golpe muy duro, él tiene que escoger entre su novia y la mujer que lo trajo el mundo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mía o de nadie
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Cuando Gisela, casi por lástima, acepta salir con Andrés en calidad de amigos, su vida se convierte en una horrible pesadilla que poco a poco la aleja de todas aquellas personas a las que ama.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mintiéndome a mí misma
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La frustración por su difícil situación económica empuja a Jaime a sellar una alianza con Armando, y juntos, comienzan a robar. Una mala decisión complica las cosas, solo tendrá una salida.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Visita del pasado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Piochas y don Mateo preparan la emboscada para liquidar a Joselito. Así, cobrarán la recompensa por su cabeza. Isabel no quiere volver a ver a Diego. Circe hace brujería para atraer a su amor.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Las comadres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Paulina y Pamela, hermanas, vienen por el dinero en efectivo para celebrar el bautizo de su bebé. Yukari y Said desean el set de muebles para equipar un rincón de reuniones sociales en su casa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Vida lejana
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Verona, influencer, está por firmar un gran contrato, pero una alerta la hace confesar un secreto que la avergüenza y que la lleva a suplicar perdón hasta el último segundo de su vida.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Ya lo agarraron de su puerquito
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tania exige que dejen en paz a su esposo, pero su suegra le reclama pagar caprichos familiares.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi esposo enfermó a mi hija
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Teresa denuncia que su esposo Andrés maltrata a su hija Azul y le ha causado daños emocionales que requieren tratamiento médico. Él niega ser su padre y rechaza asumir esos gastos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Maestra desbocada; Muerte Facebook Live
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Zulema emitió su opinión contra el presidente Trump, Itzel la subió a las redes y la despidieron. También, la amante de Andrés se suicidó por Facebook Live: allí los culpó a él y a su esposa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La gallinita ciega; Morticia
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Para levantar la moral de sus trabajadores, Luis contrata un crucero y organiza una orgía. También, Morticia tiene una empresa funeraria que se dedica a levantar y reconstruir cadáveres.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi papá se quiere dar a mi novia
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Víctor cree que su padre anda tras su novia, pero él afirma que su hijo malinterpreta sus acciones.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Hombre muerto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El estado de salud de Corona empeora y las esperanzas son cada vez menores. Isabel está dispuesta a hacer lo que sea para salvar al padre de sus hijos. Gavino y Joselito se declaran la guerra.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Meditación tortuosa; El riñón es mío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El niño de Miriam tiene ataques de pánico desde que lo dejaron solo y a oscuras en una terapia. Mildrey viajó para hacerse una cirugía estética; de regreso descubre que le falta un riñón.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: ¿Quién responde?; Josefina la gobos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El hijo de Luis y Jéssica fue a una excursión al Amazonas y sufrió un accidente mortal. Además, Josefina es una travesti que fue abusada en la prisión de mujeres y en la de hombres.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Regresa hija
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tras perder a su madre, las cosas entre Lucy y su papá se complican. Él se dedica a trabajar y ella se siente desatendida, por eso decide irse con Enrique.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi esposo enfermó a mi hija
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Teresa denuncia que su esposo Andrés maltrata a su hija Azul y le ha causado daños emocionales que requieren tratamiento médico. Él niega ser su padre y rechaza asumir esos gastos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Por una letra; Vengadora anónima
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Miguel y su hijo compusieron una canción, pero el joven creo una versión vulgar que afectó el prestigio de su padre. Además, Yissel aprendió "kick-boxing" y logró vengarse de su violador.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Peluca asesina; Viviendo en ruinas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Sofía es una transexual que sufrió maltrato de su padre por su condición sexual y en una pelea lo mató. También, Izrael compró una casa en mal estado para venderla, pero su hijo se enfermó.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Tan fuerte como tú
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El esposo de Daniela sufre un derrame cerebral y queda en coma. Los médicos proponen que lo desconecten del respirador artificial, pero ella se niega y pide fuerzas para superar la situación.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Una oportunidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El sueño de Leticia es ser bailarina, pero su padre se opone y la obliga a que renuncie a sus clases de baile. Ella decide seguir a escondidas de él, hasta que un día es descubierta.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Reencuentros
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un anciano que trabaja recolectando cartón junto a su perro encuentra a un niño en la calle. Los tres viven felices como una familia hasta que un día alguien se encarga de separarlos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mis princesas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Brenda y Eloísa, su madre, viven dominadas por Alonso, un hombre violento, machista y misógino que lleva una doble vida, pero cuando la joven entra a la universidad, su historia da un giro.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Muerta en vida
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Esperanza está infectada con VIH, pero como no tiene recursos, no ha sido diagnosticada. Cuando recibe la confirmación de su enfermedad, busca a su marido y la reacción no es la que esperaba.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Hombre muerto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El estado de salud de Corona empeora y las esperanzas son cada vez menores. Isabel está dispuesta a hacer lo que sea para salvar al padre de sus hijos. Gavino y Joselito se declaran la guerra.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Una enjaulada y un gran escape
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Estefanía y Diana están listas para llevarse el dinero en efectivo y darle un buen uso, por eso juegan a El Pachuco. Los hermanos Eder y Ever luchan con fuerza para ganar una cocina integral.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Paz interior
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Aldo es un exitoso profesor de yoga que tuvo una adolescencia violenta. Las consecuencias de sus actos lo llevan al borde de la muerte, sin embargo, intenta obtener un tiempo extra para vivir.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi papá se quiere dar a mi novia
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Víctor cree que su padre anda tras su novia, pero él afirma que su hijo malinterpreta sus acciones.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi mamá me bajó al sugar
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Danitza enfrenta a su madre Eva, quien la impulsa a iniciar una relación con un hombre mayor de 63 años para cubrir sus gastos, pero luego ella decide enamorar al mismo hombre.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Horrible incesto; Orgasmo telepático
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La hermana e hija de Gladis se casaron y viven en su casa, ella exige que desalojen. María tiene multiorgasmos involuntarios provocados vía telepática por un mexicano, su marido se aprovecha.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Cosquillas torturadoras; Por su culpa caí
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Cuando Juan tiene sexo con su esposa le hace cosquillas, y ella no lo soporta. Alejandro denunció a su amigo Antonio en inmigración porque es indocumentado, y le dieron su puesto en la empresa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Si saben cómo soy para que andan conmigo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Esmeralda rechaza la relación de su hija con un mujeriego, él acusa a su suegra de ser alcohólica.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Fuera del escondite
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Los Gaona atacan a balazos las bodegas de la Mami Chula y Joselito va con todo para capturarla. Ella trata de escapar, pero recibe un disparo. Diego extraña a Isabel. Fernanda se divorcia.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: 150 libras menos; ¿Dónde está mi hijo?
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ana quiere tener relaciones sexuales con su esposo Juan, pero este se niega porque teme por la salud de ella. Además, Maxula le entregó su hijo a Anahis, pero le devolvieron otro.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Conviviendo con la Diabla; Ajuste de cuentas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Vaneza descubrió que la bebé que adoptó es la nieta de su esposo y quiere revocar la adopción. Alberto fue a prisión por violar a su cuñada que tuvo un hijo y luego se suicidó.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El perfume de tu recuerdo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Luis vive entregado al trabajo, su esposa Susana le pide que le dedique más tiempo a la familia, pero él ignora su pedido hasta que ella sufre un derrame cerebral. Una tragedia se convierte en una oportunidad.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi mamá me bajó al sugar
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Danitza enfrenta a su madre Eva, quien la impulsa a iniciar una relación con un hombre mayor de 63 años para cubrir sus gastos, pero luego ella decide enamorar al mismo hombre.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Prejuicio dañino; Prostitución de muñecas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Claudia sufrió un accidente con su familia y desde que salió del coma no recuerda quiénes son. En otro caso, Eva y su hija tienen cada cual una tienda de muñecas; pero solo a una le va bien.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Hija contra madre; Justicia inservible
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Karla cree que su madre la abandonó a merced de su padre, que abusó de ella, pero descubre un oscuro secreto. Además, Paola se está separando de su esposo Alberto, pero este la drogó.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Con la fe perdida
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ariel no ha logrado reponerse de la pérdida de su hijo Eduardo, quien murió en un accidente. La vida de todos cambia con la aparición de Félix, un joven ladrón que, en realidad, es un miembro de la familia.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Vidas en juego
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ramiro no consigue trabajo y no tiene los medios para abastecer a su familia. Desesperado, pone toda su confianza en su compadre y la vida se le complica cuando se deja llevar por el mal camino.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Caminar juntos por la vida
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El día de su boda, Alicia es arrollada por un automóvil y queda inválida. Su novio, Ricardo, la abandona, pero Gustavo llega a su vida.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Así lo quiero
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Angelina, por ignorancia, ha soportado por décadas el maltrato y las humillaciones de Gabino, pero gracias a su amiga Carmelita comienza a tomar conciencia, da el primer paso para cambiar.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Hazlo por ti
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Daniela y Lupita son dos reporteras que viven en carne propia la inundación de su colonia, al llamar la atención sobre las necesidades de los damnificados, descubren a gente sin escrúpulos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Fuera del escondite
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Los Gaona atacan a balazos las bodegas de la Mami Chula y Joselito va con todo para capturarla. Ella trata de escapar, pero recibe un disparo. Diego extraña a Isabel. Fernanda se divorcia.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Preguntas muy sencillas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Mariela y Omar quieren llevarse la sala de entretenimiento, pero deben dominar la ansiedad que le producen las preguntas. Verónica y Amanda vienen a participar para ganar el automóvil.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El engaño
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Emma, asesina a sueldo, ahora necesita salvar a la hija de una de sus víctimas, quien quedó a la deriva y en malos pasos, pero esperará hasta el último segundo para decirle la verdad.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Si saben cómo soy para que andan conmigo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Esmeralda rechaza la relación de su hija con un mujeriego, él acusa a su suegra de ser alcohólica.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi mamá se cansó de luchar
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: César está preocupado porque su madre asegura que se curó del cáncer que la afectó durante siete años, pero él insiste en que confirme el diagnóstico con una segunda opinión médica.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Paida lajin; Acoso en el elevador
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Patricia busca la custodia de su nieta con autismo porque la madre quiere tratarla a golpes. Geraldine se quedó encerrada en el ascensor de su edificio con un depredador sexual.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La silla eléctrica
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ramón está inválido y su silla eléctrica es su cuerpo, el sustento de vida.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La pasión de Diego
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Diego logra rescatar a Circe de las garras de Joselito, la lleva a donde él vive y cura sus heridas. La Mami Chula aprovecha la ocasión para recordarle que él siempre será de ella.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Live: Fútbol estelar Liga MX: Extra
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Todo lo que pasa antes y después de los partidos de Liga MX, con lo mejor de Chivas, Tigres y Juárez. Análisis, datos y las voces de los protagonistas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Live: Fútbol Mexicano Primera División
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Acción de la fecha 14 del Clausura 2026. Ambos equipos buscan una victoria para alcanzar la zona de liguilla.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El que se raja pierde; American First
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Claudia y Patricia vivían en trío en un motorhome con el hermano de Ricardo, pero el chico murió. También, Diego vive con Néstor, un "soñador" sin papeles, a quien siempre discrimina e insulta.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La dulcería
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Las olimpiadas de la seducción
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Un castigo rojo; Tranquilo mafioso
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Rebeca alardea de hacer cosas malas para ser cool y su madre la puso en evidencia. Urbano le alquila un local a una congregación religiosa, pero su esposa comienza a formar parte y sale embarazada.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Niña caprichosa; Porno a la musulmana
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Aniuska descubre que su esposo desaparecido y su hija están con una mujer que resultó ser su hermana. Como su sobrino y su hermano fueron víctimas de un musulmán, ella usa la pornovenganza.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Hija legal, nieta oficial; La confederación
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Raúl golpeó a su esposa porque Miladis salió embarazada y él es estéril. Por otro lado, por culpa de Javier, la esposa de Enrique fue deportada y ahora él está solo con sus hijos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Autista depredador
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El hijo de Elizabeth y Omar es autista, pero ninguno quiere la custodia de Fidel porque es adicto al porno.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Me muero por la gimnasia; Papá por fuera, mamá por dentro
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El hermano de Denise es un gimnasta profesional que tras una operación no puede competir, pero él insiste. Alía es un hombre en proceso de transformación a mujer, pero su esposa ya no soporta eso.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Refugio para demonios; Se la llevó la corriente
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Solanch y Marcelo tienen un albergue de gente transgénero, pero Marcelo ahora quiere sacarlos. También, en un viaje de vacaciones, el mar arrastró a la sobrina de Miguel y murió, ahora él tiene un trauma.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Live: Fútbol Femenino Amistosos Internacionales
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Desde el Estadio PayPal Park, en San José, California.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: No voy a criar a la hija de otra
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tras recibir a la hija de la amante de su esposo, Maricela se arrepiente de la decisión porque la joven muestra conducta agresiva y se niega a respetar las reglas de convivencia en su hogar.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío al límite
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi papá se comporta como un perro
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Erick se queja de que Aidé, la novia de su padre, lo haga actuar como un perro para satisfacer sus fantasías sexuales. Ella no ve nada malo en que le guste jugar sexualmente a los animales.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Allá en la Plaza Garibaldi
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un chico busca por toda la ciudad a su único pariente vivo, y se involucra con un grupo de golfos de la calle.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Asociación contra el bullying
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jean Carlos tiene una asociación donde les enseñan a las víctimas de bullying a tomar venganza con la misma violencia.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: LaLiga
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Mallorca-Real Madrid
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Los mejores clubes del país protagonizan LaLiga, el campeonato de la regularidad del fútbol español. El torneo es una carrera de fondo en la que los equipos pelean por sus metas: la salvación, Europa, la Champions o el título. El Barcelona defiende corona.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Previo UEFA Champions League
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Barcelona-Atlético de Madrid
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Espacio que se emite antes del comienzo de una nueva jornada de la Champions League. En él se repasa la actualidad de los equipos españoles que participan en la competición y se hacen previas de todos los partidos que se disputan durante la semana.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Champions League
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Barcelona-Atlético de Madrid
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: La máxima competición del deporte europeo garantiza emoción y buen fútbol. 36 equipos se juegan el pase a la gloria durante una fase liga antes de llegar a las eliminatorias, en las que los partidos son a cara de perro. El PSG defiende título.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Post UEFA Champions League
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Barcelona-Atlético de Madrid
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Tras la disputa de los encuentros, es tiempo para el análisis. Este espacio desmenuza los partidos con las mejores imágenes, intenta esclarecer las polémicas y da la palabra a los que han sido los protagonistas sobre el césped.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: UEFA Conference League
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Rayo-AEK Atenas
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Poco a poco, la Conference League se va consolidando como una competición a seguir. El tercer torneo de la UEFA aglutina a 36 equipos en su fase liga, al igual que el resto de competiciones UEFA. El Chelsea es el actual campeón.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Europa League
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Friburgo-Celta
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Es la segunda competición de la UEFA, pero siempre cuenta con equipos de primer nivel. Tras una fase liga de ocho jornadas, solo los mejores disputarán las eliminatorias por el título. La final de esta edición se disputará en el Besiktas Stadium de Estambul.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Real Sociedad B - Ceuta
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: La igualdad es la nota imperante en LaLiga HyperMotion, la Segunda División de fútbol español. Muchos son los aspirantes al ascenso, bien en busca de las dos plazas directas o por la vía del emocionante playoff con el que culmina la temporada. Sin duda, una competición con equipos de primera.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Inside - El gran derbi
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Un recorrido por la organización de El Gran Derbi de Sevilla y el impacto de la piratería audiovisual.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Sporting - Real Sociedad B
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Sporting querrá imponer ritmo y ganar metros con amplitud, buscando ventajas en tres cuartos y ataques al área. Partido con puntos que mueven la aguja en la categoría: R. Sociedad B intentará sostenerse con orden y castigar en transición o estrategia; los detalles en las áreas marcarán el guion.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Zaragoza - Mirandés
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: La Romareda pide oficio: el Zaragoza buscará un partido sobrio, control emocional y protección del área propia. Con la permanencia como hoja de ruta, los maños necesitan eficiencia; el Mirandés intentará hacer daño en transiciones y segundas jugadas.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Andorra - Racing
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Andorra querrá imponer ritmo y ganar metros con amplitud, buscando ventajas en tres cuartos y ataques al área. Partido con puntos que mueven la aguja en la categoría: Racing intentará sostenerse con orden y castigar en transición o estrategia; los detalles en las áreas marcarán el guion.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Inside - El gran derbi
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Un recorrido por la organización de El Gran Derbi de Sevilla y el impacto de la piratería audiovisual.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Deportivo - Málaga
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Deportivo querrá imponer ritmo y ganar metros con amplitud, buscando ventajas en tres cuartos y ataques al área. Partido con puntos que mueven la aguja en la categoría: Málaga intentará sostenerse con orden y castigar en transición o estrategia; los detalles en las áreas marcarán el guion.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Real Sociedad B - Ceuta
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: La igualdad es la nota imperante en LaLiga HyperMotion, la Segunda División de fútbol español. Muchos son los aspirantes al ascenso, bien en busca de las dos plazas directas o por la vía del emocionante playoff con el que culmina la temporada. Sin duda, una competición con equipos de primera.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Especiales LaLiga fin de temporada
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: El sentido: Laliga Genuine
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: LaLiga EA Sports ha finalizado otro curso plagado de historias y de fútbol. El campeonato español de la regularidad deja relatos para el recuerdo y héroes que se han convertido en los protagonistas de la temporada.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Burgos - Sporting
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Burgos CF buscará imponer ritmo y ganar metros con amplitud, atacando el área con paciencia y control del tempo. Duelo con puntos que mueven la aguja en la categoría: Real Sporting intentará sostenerse con orden y castigar en transición o estrategia; los detalles en las áreas marcarán el guion.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Previa Segunda División
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: Málaga - Las Palmas
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Toda la información previa a los partidos que se van a disputar en la siguiente jornada de competición. Noticias, estadísticas, análisis y los datos necesarios para disfrutar más de los encuentros.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Málaga - Las Palmas
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Málaga CF buscará imponer ritmo y ganar metros con amplitud, atacando el área con paciencia y control del tempo. Duelo con puntos que mueven la aguja en la categoría: UD Las Palmas intentará sostenerse con orden y castigar en transición o estrategia; los detalles en las áreas marcarán el guion.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Post Segunda División
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: Málaga - Las Palmas
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Tras la disputa de los encuentros, es tiempo para el análisis. Los entrenadores de los equipos de LaLiga HyperMotion desmenuzan las claves que, según ellos, han propiciado el resultado del partido que acaban de jugar.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Córdoba - Zaragoza
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: El Córdoba buscará amplitud y diagonales a la espalda del lateral para instalarse cerca del área rival. El Zaragoza, con la permanencia como hoja de ruta, priorizará solidez y eficacia; si compite los rechaces y la estrategia, podrá rascar en un duelo de márgenes estrechos.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA VS
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: Jesús Gallego, Alicia Espinosa y José Luis Guzmán
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: LALIGA VS es una plataforma de LALIGA cuya misión es erradicar el odio tanto dentro fuera de los estadios, visibilizando y condenando todas aquellas conductas que no tienen cabida en el fútbol. Este podcast trae charlas entre referentes del mundo del fútbol y de otros sectores para hablar del odio en los estadios, empezando por el racismo, con personajes que cuentan sus historias en primera persona.
